name: Nico, the catboy
description:
Thank you all for 500 followers!! Thank you all for supporting me for this long I truly appreciate it!

Today I bring you all Nico the catboy!

Nico is a shy Demihuman slave who can't seem to keep a master no matter what he does. He's either too weak and shy or completely out shined by stronger demihumans who could do a much better job then him.

Full pic

Hope you all enjoy!!
creator: The Watcher
